const inventory = [ { id:1, year:2023, make:"Toyota", model:"Corolla", trim:"LE", price:null, priceDisplay:"Sold", mileage:"7,500 KM", mileageNote:"Low Mileage", color:"White Exterior / Black Interior", condition:"10/10", conditionLabel:"Mint Condition", status:"Excellent / Ready to Drive", category:"Sedan", sold:true, images:COROLLA_IMGS, specs:[ {label:"Engine",value:"2.0L 4-Cylinder"},{label:"Transmission",value:"CVT Automatic"}, {label:"Drive",value:"Front-Wheel Drive"},{label:"Fuel Type",value:"Petrol"}, {label:"Seats",value:"5 Passengers"},{label:"Body",value:"4-Door Sedan"}, ], history:{title:"Vehicle History",note:"A minor container dent that occurred during import was repaired to a high professional standard by a certified body shop. All other components are original and unmodified."}, features:["Apple CarPlay / Android Auto","8\" Touchscreen","Backup Camera","Blind Spot Monitor","Lane Departure Alert","Adaptive Cruise Control"], }, { id:2, year:2024, make:"Toyota", model:"Corolla Cross", trim:"LE", price:null, priceDisplay:"Message for Private Quote", mileage:"28,031 MI", mileageNote:"USA Import", color:"Magnetic Grey / Beige & Black Interior", condition:"9.5/10", conditionLabel:"Like New", status:"Excellent / Ready to Drive", category:"Crossover SUV", sold:false, images:CROSS_IMGS, specs:[ {label:"Engine",value:"2.0L 4-Cylinder"},{label:"Transmission",value:"CVT Automatic"}, {label:"Spec",value:"USA Import"},{label:"Fuel Type",value:"Petrol"}, {label:"Seats",value:"5 Passengers"},{label:"Body",value:"5-Door Crossover SUV"}, ], history:{title:"Vehicle History",note:"Freshly imported from USA. Brand new condition — immaculate interior and exterior. No accidents or damage. Full import documentation available on request."}, features:["Toyota Safety Sense","Blind Spot Monitoring","Rear Cross-Traffic Alert","Apple CarPlay / Android Auto","8\" Touchscreen","Backup Camera","Roof Rails","LED Headlights"], }, { id:3, year:2023, make:"Toyota", model:"Raize", trim:"G Turbo", price:54000, priceDisplay:"AED 54,000", mileage:"Low Mileage", mileageNote:"Well Maintained", color:"White Exterior / Black Interior", condition:"9/10", conditionLabel:"Excellent", status:"Excellent / Ready to Drive", category:"Compact SUV", sold:false, images:RAIZE_IMGS, specs:[ {label:"Engine",value:"1.0L Turbo"},{label:"Transmission",value:"CVT Automatic"}, {label:"Drive",value:"Front-Wheel Drive"},{label:"Fuel Type",value:"Petrol"}, {label:"Seats",value:"5 Passengers"},{label:"Body",value:"5-Door Compact SUV"}, ], history:{title:"Vehicle History",note:"Single-owner, well-maintained vehicle. Clean interior and exterior with no accidents or damage. Ready for immediate transfer."}, features:["1.0L Turbo Engine","Full Option — G Turbo Trim","Apple CarPlay / Android Auto","Reverse Camera","Parking Sensors","LED Headlights","Alloy Wheels","Touchscreen Display"], }, ]; function buildWA(car) { return `https://wa.me/${WHATSAPP_NUMBER}?text=${encodeURIComponent(`Interested in the ${car.year} ${car.make} ${car.model} ${car.trim}`)}`; } function WAIcon({size=18}) { return ; } function ab(side){return{position:"absolute",top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",[side]:10,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.45)",border:"none",color:"#fff",width:34,height:34,borderRadius:"50%",fontSize:22,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:2};} function Carousel({images,sold,height=220}){ const [i,si]=useState(0); const sx=useRef(null); const n=images.length; return(
{sx.current=e.touches[0].clientX;}} onTouchEnd={e=>{if(!sx.current)return;const d=sx.current-e.changedTouches[0].clientX;if(Math.abs(d)>40)si(x=>d>0?(x+1)%n:(x-1+n)%n);sx.current=null;}}> {sold&&
SOLD
} {!sold&&n>1&&<>
{images.map((_,x)=>
{e.stopPropagation();si(x);}} style={{width:x===i?18:6,height:6,borderRadius:3,background:x===i?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)",cursor:"pointer",transition:"all 0.2s"}}/>)}
{i+1}/{n}
}
); } function Modal({car,onClose}){ const [i,si]=useState(0); const sx=useRef(null); const n=car.images.length; useEffect(()=>{document.body.style.overflow="hidden";return()=>{document.body.style.overflow="";};},[]); return(
e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:BG,borderRadius:16,width:"100%",maxWidth:720,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)"}}>
{sx.current=e.touches[0].clientX;}} onTouchEnd={e=>{if(!sx.current)return;const d=sx.current-e.changedTouches[0].clientX;if(Math.abs(d)>40)si(x=>d>0?(x+1)%n:(x-1+n)%n);sx.current=null;}}> {car.sold&&
SOLD
} {!car.sold&&n>1&&<>
{car.images.map((_,x)=>
{e.stopPropagation();si(x);}} style={{width:x===i?22:7,height:7,borderRadius:4,background:x===i?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",cursor:"pointer"}}/>)}
{i+1}/{n}
}

{[{label:"Mileage",value:`${car.mileage} · ${car.mileageNote}`},{label:"Color",value:car.color},{label:"Status",value:car.status},...car.specs].map(s=>(

{s.value}
))}

):(

)}
); } function Card({car,onSelect}){ return(
onSelect(car)} style={{background:BG,border:`1px solid ${BORDER}`,borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden",cursor:"pointer",transition:"transform 0.18s,box-shadow 0.18s",boxShadow:"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)",opacity:car.sold?0.82:1}} onMouseEnter={e=>{if(!car.sold){e.currentTarget.style.transform="translateY(-3px)";e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 8px 30px rgba(37,99,235,0.12)";}}} onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.transform="translateY(0)";e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)";}}>

{car.trim} · {car.category}

{car.sold?Sold:{car.condition} — {car.conditionLabel}}
{car.sold?"SOLD":car.priceDisplay}
{[{icon:"◎",v:car.mileage},{icon:"◈",v:car.color.split("/")[0].trim()},{icon:"◷",v:car.status.split("/")[0].trim()}].map(x=>(
{x.icon}{x.v}
))}
{car.sold?(
Sold — View Details
):( )}
); } export default function App(){ const [sel,setSel]=useState(null); const [sort,setSort]=useState("default"); const [showSold,setShowSold]=useState(true); const list=[...inventory].filter(c=>showSold?true:!c.sold).sort((a,b)=>{ if(sort==="year-desc") return b.year-a.year; if(sort==="year-asc") return a.year-b.year; if(sort==="price-asc") return (a.price??Infinity)-(b.price??Infinity); if(sort==="price-desc") return (b.price??0)-(a.price??0); return a.id-b.id; }); const avail=inventory.filter(c=>!c.sold).length; return(
